sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40456" key="e)pipa/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπάτωρ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πατήρ</etym>) <sense id="n40456.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stepfather</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
